data.title: Ethereum Spot ETFs Experience Significant Outflows
data.description: According to Odaily, data from SoSoValue indicates that Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $18.63 million on March 21, Eastern Time. The largest single-day net outflow was recorded by BlackRock's ETF ETHA, amounting to $11.93 million, with its historical total net inflow reaching $4.073 billion. Grayscale's ETF ETH followed with a net outflow of $6.692 million, and its historical total net inflow stands at $577 million. As of the latest report, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs is $6.769 billion, with an ETF net asset ratio of 2.84% compared to Ethereum's total market value. The cumulative historical net inflow has reached $2.417 billion.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETF had a total net inflow of 83.0919 million US dollars yesterday, continuing its net inflow for 6 consecutive days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (March 21, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was 83.0919 million US dollars.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was BlackRock Bitcoin ETF IBIT, with a net inflow of 105 million US dollars in a single day. Currently, IBIT's total net inflow has reached 39.774 billion US dollars.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Grayscale Bitcoin ETF GBTC, with a net outflow of 21.8972 million US dollars in a single day. Currently, GBTC's total net outflow has reached 22.526 billion US dollars.

As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs was 94.351 billion US dollars, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Bitcoin) reached 5.65%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached 36.048 billion US dollars.

data.title: XLM Price to Finally Rise After Falling Wedge Patten for Over 115days?
data.description:
Stellar Lumens (XLM) price has been consolidating within a falling wedge pattern for 115 days, raising speculation of a potential breakout. Market analysts believe this technical structure is inherently bullish, as it often signals a reversal after a period of declining prices..
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/21/xlm-price-to-finally-rise-after-falling-wedge-patten-for-over-115days/

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net outflow of 18.6309 million US dollars yesterday, continuing its net outflow for 13 consecutive days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (March 21, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Ethereum spot ETFs was $18.6309 million.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was BlackRock ETF ETHA, with a single-day net outflow of $11.9387 million. Currently, ETHA has a total net inflow of $4.073 billion.
The second is Grayscale ETF ETH, with a single-day net outflow of $6.6922 million. Currently, ETH has a total net inflow of $577 million.

As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs is $6.769 billion, and the ETF net asset ratio (market value to Ethereum's total market value) is 2.84%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached $2.417 billion.

data.title: Fidelity Pursues Tokenized Treasury Fund Amid BUIDL Competition
data.description:
Fidelity to launch tokenized fund targeting U.S. Treasuries, rivaling BlackRock's $1B BUIDL.
source: https://coincu.com/327883-fidelity-tokenized-treasury-fund-buidl

data.title: Amber Group deposited $10.35 million of ENA to Binance in the past 12 hours
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, Amber Group, one of ENA's market makers, has recharged about $10.35 million of ENA to Binance in the past 12 hours. Among them, 6.96 million ENA (about $2.5 million) came from the part withdrawn from Binance at an average price of $0.3979 two weeks ago, and 21.87 million ENA (about $7.85 million) came from the Ethena Claim address around April 7, 2024.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 630 USDT with a Narrowed 0.13% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 22, 2025, 03:16 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 630 USDT and is now trading at 629.880005 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.13% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Fidelity to Launch Tokenized U.S. Treasury Fund Competing with BlackRock's BUIDL
data.description: According to Odaily, Fidelity is set to introduce a tokenized fund focused on investing in U.S. Treasury securities. This move positions Fidelity in direct competition with BlackRock's BUIDL fund, which also targets similar investment opportunities.

data.title: The LAYER whale that opened a position three weeks ago is suspected to have liquidated its position to take profit, and may have made a profit of US$1.704 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, the smart money (TOP6 whales) who opened a position of 6 million $LAYER at an average price of $0.9559 three weeks ago was suspected to have cleared the position 5 hours ago. If the sale is confirmed, the expected profit is $1.704 million, with a return rate of about 78%.
Against the background of BTC's downward fluctuations, $LAYER's trend is against the trend and is currently reported at $1.16. Another address also opened a position during the same period, and has not yet stopped profit. The floating profit is about $1.118 million, with a return rate of 47.7%.

data.title: Whale Unstakes 38,821 SOL After Year of Inactivity
data.description: According to PANews, a significant cryptocurrency holder has unstaked 38,821 SOL, valued at $5 million, after a year of inactivity. The whale initially staked 35,777 SOL and earned an additional 3,044 SOL. Despite this, the holder is facing a loss exceeding $100,000.
